incentives.eligibility: You may be eligible for our PowerResponse program, and by participating in events, you may be eligible for rebates which may change over time. See website energyaustralia.com.au/power-response for details on eligibility criteria, T&C’s and rebates.

eligibility.information: The details in this fact sheet are for residential customers located in the distribution area outlined with the meter configuration described. Offer only available through selected third party channels.

greenPowerCharges.description: PureEnergy 10% = $0.0495 x (10% x total usage)
PureEnergy 20% = $0.0495 x (20% x total usage)
PureEnergy 100% = $0.0495 per kWh

incentives.description: Perfect if you love free stuff
incentives.displayName: Perfect if you love free stuff
incentives.eligibility: $0.00 for the first 50kwh/day between 12pm-3pm (Local Time), excluding controlled load.
$1/Day when imports are 0.03 kWh/hour or less, between 6pm-9pm (Local Time).
10 cents/kWh applies to the first 15 kWh of exports between 6pm-9pm (Local Time) everyday, and is inclusive of any other Feed-in tariff as applicable in Energy Plan.

$1/kWh applies to any export during a Critical Peak-Export event. The timing of these events is determined at our discretion, as detailed in a notice we provide. Your premises' metering installation must support 5-minute interval data.

5 cents/kWh applies to any import during a Critical Peak-Import event. The timing of these events is determined at our discretion, as detailed in a notice we provide. Your premises' metering installation must support 5-minute interval data.
2 cents/kWh applies to exports between 4pm-11pm (Local Time) everyday.

eligibility.information: You must have installed an eligible battery and solar-PV. You must have an eligible smart meter. For eligibility criteria call 133456.

fees.description:
This Powershop offer has no exit fees
Other fees may apply. Information regarding fees is set out on our fees page powershop.com.au/fees
Powershop do not charge credit card fees.
Disconnection fees may apply to manually de-energise a property. The fee will be passed on from your distributor and may vary.
Disconnection fees may apply to remotely de-energise a property. The fee will be passed on from your distributor and may vary.
Connection fees may apply to manually energise a property. The fee will be passed on from your distributor and may vary.
Connection fees may apply to remotely energise a property. The fee will be passed on from your distributor and may vary.

electricityContract.terms: We do not issue paper bills and require a credit card or bank details. For more information in relation to Powershop and this offer, see full terms and conditions at: www.powershop.com.au/terms-and-conditions

discounts.description: $200 sign up credit is available to new and moving customers only, and is applied 90 days after your Powershop online account has become active. We will send you an email letting you know when you’re officially a customer.

electricityContract.variation: We may vary your prices in accordance with our regulatory requirements. If we vary your prices we’ll give you advance notice, usually by email.

eligibility.information: Must be a new Powershop residential customer, or an existing Powershop residential customer  who is moving premises, and taking up your first electricity market contract with Powershop for the premises you switch. For full terms, see https://www.powershop.com.au/customer-terms-and-conditions/energy-offers-terms-and-conditions

greenPowerCharges.description: 100% GreenPower for 1.1c/kWh inc. GST (no discounts apply to GreenPower charges)

electricityContract.onExpiryDescription: This Powershop offer is an ongoing contract (until you or we end it) with no exit fees.

fees.description:
Charged when a direct debit payment has dishonoured or reversed. This charge is not subject to GST.
Additional fees may apply. For more information, please visit the retailers website at energy.arcline.com.au/fees
Charged per paper bill
May be charged when you move into a property or change retailer. Actual fee may vary.
May be charged when you move out and require a final meter read. Actual fee may vary.

We accept Visa and Mastercard payments via energy.arcline.com.au/payment. Debit card transactions are subject to a 0.46% fee, and credit card payments incur a 0.81% fee. Credit and debit card processing fees are waived for Direct Debit payments.

Disconnection fees may apply to manually de-energise a property. The fee will be passed on from your distributor and may vary.

electricityContract.terms: Kogan Energy is provided by Powershop Australia Pty Ltd. We do not issue paper bills and require a credit card or bank details. For more information in relation to Kogan Energy and this offer, see full terms and conditions at: koganenergy.com.au/terms-conditions.
electricityContract.variation: We may vary your prices in accordance with our regulatory requirements. If we vary your prices we'll give you advance notice, usually by email

incentives.eligibility: $100 (incl. GST) sign-up credit for new Kogan Energy customers with an existing annual FIRST membership. Eligibility criteria and conditions apply – see https://www.koganenergy.com.au/first-offers-terms/

eligibility.information: You must have a current annual FIRST membership. Further eligibility criteria and conditions apply.
